scripts.dev: npm run dev:server & npm run dev:client
scripts.dev:server: cd python-server && ANKI_DEFS_DEV=1 uv run uvicorn anki_defs.main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 3001 --reload
scripts.start: cd python-server && uv run uvicorn anki_defs.main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 3001
scripts.check: npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm run format:check
scripts.check:py: cd python-server && uv run ruff check . && uv run pyright && uv run pytest tests/ -q
